name: Moss
headline: Yellow-green paper color language
summary: A dry yellow-green palette for code interfaces.
positioning: A yellow-green paper line inside HearthCode.
audiences: users who prefer drier color worlds
clean charcoal and paper palette preference

constraints.thermalBaseline: clean charcoal substrate, parchment carriers, restrained bronze chrome, and no full-page brown wash
constraints.allowWarmPressure: yes, but in disciplined rust, olive, old-gold, plum, and oxidized teal lanes rather than full-page sepia
avoid: ui chrome colored like syntax hero accents
